[[BLOCK:srt_255]]
Speaker 1: All right.

[[BLOCK:srt_256]]
Speaker 1: First, congratulations on completing your studies at Golden Gate University (金门大学) and earning your degrees.

[[BLOCK:srt_257]]
Speaker 1: I know many of you worked full time while pursuing your studies.

[[BLOCK:srt_258]]
Speaker 1: 7, 6.

[[BLOCK:srt_259]]
Speaker 1: Let me repeat that.

[[BLOCK:srt_260]]
Speaker 1: It’s 9, 6, 9, 9, 6.

[[BLOCK:srt_261]]
Speaker 1: Once again, congratulations on completing your degree programs at Golden Gate University.

[[BLOCK:srt_262]]
Speaker 1: And welcome to Golden Gate University’s global alumni community. We now have more than 60,000 alumni worldwide, and we’re truly delighted to welcome you as our newest members.

[[BLOCK:srt_263]]
Speaker 1: I also want to recognize your hard work. Earning a degree is a significant accomplishment.

[[BLOCK:srt_264]]
Speaker 1: Many of you balanced careers and family responsibilities while remaining committed to your studies. Your dedication and perseverance are truly admirable.

[[BLOCK:srt_265]]
Speaker 2: Let’s revise that sentence.
